steps.t: Vaskorn can be found in Limlók. You should talk to Vaskorn.
Vaskorn has asked you to patrol the wilds north of Limlók. You should patrol the wilds near the White Mare.
Vaskorn has asked you to patrol the wilds north of Limlók. You should patrol the wilds north of the White Mare.
Vaskorn has asked you to patrol the wilds north of Limlók. You should patrol the wilds west of the river.
Vaskorn can be found in Limlók. You should talk to Vaskorn.
